hooks.prompt: A Formspec JSON Schema file was just edited. Launch the `formspec-specs:schema-reference-writer` agent in the background to update the reference map for the changed schema file. Pass it the exact file path from $ARGUMENTS. After it completes, launch the `formspec-specs:skill-updater` agent to regenerate SKILL.md.

A Formspec spec file was just edited. Check the file path in $ARGUMENTS — if it ends in `.llm.md` or `.bluf.md`, these are generated files, do nothing. Otherwise, launch the `formspec-specs:spec-reference-writer` agent in the background to update the reference map for the changed spec file. Pass it the exact file path. After it completes, launch the `formspec-specs:skill-updater` agent to regenerate SKILL.md.
